headline: How The DaVita (DVA) Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets And Valuation Assumptions
summary: DaVita’s latest analyst update keeps the model fair value anchored at US$193.71 per share, signaling a steady headline price target in the newest run of assumptions. Behind that number, recent research has focused on how changes in discount rates and company specific risk views are shaping both higher targets and ongoing caution around the stock. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative fits together and what it can mean for tracking DaVita from here. Analyst Price Targets...

headline: DaVita Gains 21.4% in Three Months: How Should You Play the Stock?
summary: DVA raises guidance on stronger dialysis volumes and reimbursement gains, but rising patient-care and technology costs could squeeze margins.
